title: Add brand-aware Atlas fixtures and docs for Brandie-backed review metadata
description: Create realistic example manifests, session indexes, and docs that show how Brandie review-pack metadata flows through Atlas and into Sentinel without Sentinel owning the brand system.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel ships at least one Atlas fixture set that includes Brandie-backed review metadata alongside captures
Docs explain clearly what data comes from Brandie, what Atlas resolves, and what Sentinel consumes
Fixture examples are realistic enough to model FitKind or Sitches-style review packs
The examples stay optional and do not imply Sentinel owns the Brandie authoring flow
proofRequirements: fixture-based tests or docs cover the brand-aware review metadata path
examples demonstrate the boundary between Atlas-owned and Brandie-owned data
nonGoals: replacing Atlas as the review dashboard
